framework.name: Multi-Agent Specialist Coordinator Pattern
framework.description: Architecture with a central coordinator agent orchestrating multiple specialist agents (e.g., satellite imagery analysis, social media monitoring, damage forecasting). Specialists work in parallel, write to shared memory/situational map, coordinator synthesizes and executes coordinated actions.
framework.raw_quote: the planner is actually a coordinator agent working with specialist agents... Each specialist agent feeds intelligence back to the main planner... memory component is a shared situational map that all agents can read from and write to

source.title: 10 Use Cases for AI Agents: IoT, RAG, & Disaster Response Explained
